scripts.install:all: node setup.js && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.test: concurrently "cd backend && npm run test" "cd frontend && npm run test"
scripts.dev: set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation && concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
